events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Zuckerberg San Francisco General for client 1082. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: cardiovascular. Allergies: none. Sodium ceiling 600 mg/meal, carbs 40–70 g/meal. Prefers Indian; dislikes nothing noted. Cooking ability: stovetop. 5 meals/week, zone Tenderloin.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Grilled Chicken Garden Salad
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 39 g outside 40–70 g range.

events.title: Rejected: Turkey Meatloaf with Roasted Vegetables
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 39 g outside 40–70 g range.

events.title: Matched: Kitchari with Seasonal Vegetables
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 373/600 mg ✓, carbs 52 g (target 40–70) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Dal Tadka with Brown Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 430/600 mg ✓, carbs 56 g (target 40–70) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Rajma (Kidney Bean Curry) with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 450/600 mg ✓, carbs 59 g (target 40–70) ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1082 added to route R-TEND-1 (Tenderloin), delivery 2026-07-21, window 10:00–12:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1082: 5 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
